message:
feat(abi): expand pthread lifecycle, posix_spawn, network db, and bench pinning

pthread_abi: Add pthread_exit, pthread_cancel, cancellation state/type,
pthread_kill, pthread_getcpuclockid, affinity get/set, tid/name helpers,
pthread_sigqueue, pthread_getattr_np, pthread_mutex_timedlock,
pthread_setconcurrency/getconcurrency, condvar monotonic clock support.
Introduce ManagedThreadRecord with stack_size and detach_state tracking,
thread tombstone registries for managed and detached threads, and
detached-thread TID snapshots. Add rwlock timeout (timedrdlock/timedwrlock).

pthread core (thread.rs): Unify implicit (return from start_routine) and
explicit (pthread_exit) teardown into a single exit_current_thread path so
detached threads always self-clean and TLS destructors always fire. Extract
unmapself_and_exit into a reusable helper.

process_abi: Add posix_spawn file action types CloseFrom and TcSetPgrp,
cgroup_fd/has_cgroup spawn attribute support with cgroup.procs migration
in child, and read_file_actions_mut accessor.

unistd_abi: Add network database shims (setservent/endservent/getservent,
sethostent/endhostent/gethostent, setnetent/endnetent/getnetent,
getnetbyname/getnetbyaddr, reentrant _r variants), plus additional
host-delegated unistd calls.

host_resolve: Register 13 new host symbols (pthread_exit, pthread_cancel,
cancellation state/type, testcancel, kill, getcpuclockid, affinity,
gettid_np, name get/set, sigqueue).

benches: Fix CPU pinning in membrane_bench, runtime_math_bench, and
runtime_math_kernels_bench to query the first allowed CPU via
sched_getaffinity instead of hardcoding CPU 0, preventing EINVAL on
machines where CPU 0 is not in the allowed set.

tests: Comprehensive coverage for all new pthread, process, stdlib, unistd,
and TSD functionality (+2637 test lines across 5 test files).

14 files changed, 4188 insertions(+), 537 deletions(-)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
